scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm run build:python
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.format: pnpm run format:typescript && pnpm run format:rust && pnpm run format:python
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:check:typescript && pnpm run format:check:rust && pnpm run format:check:python
scripts.format:check:python: uv run --project services/tts --locked ruff format --check services/tts
scripts.format:python: uv run --project services/tts --locked ruff format services/tts
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:typescript && pnpm run lint:rust && pnpm run lint:python
scripts.lint:python: uv run --project services/tts --locked ruff check services/tts
scripts.test: pnpm run test:typescript && pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:python
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:typescript && pnpm run typecheck:python
